final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [3:0] load_val,
    output reg [3:0] count);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (load) begin
            count <= load_val;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
